_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: their DRGs contained fewer total cells, as well as fewer SOX10+ Schwann cell precursors, the cell of origin for these pNF tumors
details: Successfully identified Schwann cell precursors in DRGs, showing fewer SOX10+ cells in Nf1 f/1809 ; Hoxb7-Cre mice compared to controls
